steps.note: Wait for casepilot project card to appear
Step 1: Click the casepilot project name on its project card
Step 2: Click the Heals link in the sidebar navigation
Step 3: Wait for the Heals heading to appear
Scroll to see all heal card content including notes
Step 5: Click Reject on the Stale demo heal card (projects-list step #1, heading selector change)
Step 6: Wait for the list to refresh after rejection
Expectation 2: Sidebar Heals badge now shows 1 (decreased from 2), confirming pending count decreased by one
Expectation 1: The rejected heal card (step #2, old-removed-project / Stale demo heal) is removed from the pending list
Expectation 1 corroboration: step #2 card is no longer in the list
Expectation 2: Sidebar Heals badge now shows 1 (decreased from 2), confirming pending count decreased by one
Expectation 2 corroboration: exactly one heal card (step #1) remains in the list
